body:
**Uberon terms**
UBERON:0009548 hepatic sinusoid of left of lobe of liver
and 
UBERON:0009549 hepatic sinusoid of right of lobe of liver

**Bug description**
Labels should read "hepatic sinusoid of left lobe of liver" and "hepatic sinusoid of right lobe of liver" respectively.

Thanks,

Paola
title: Typos in labels of UBERON:0009548 and UBERON:0009549
